title: Kopeyka's Bunker Mod
description: A mod about nuclear and bunker things.
body:
**⚠WARNING! This mod contains flashing lights and loud sounds!⚠**

This mod adds a lot of cool things: 2 new biomes - acid forest (can spawn naturally) and burnt wastelands (can spawn only after nuke explodes), many new blocks and decorations - Protected Column, Radiation danger sign and other, some game mechanics - iron/copper electro furnance and oil generator (gives power to electro furnance by burning oil), and of course **a nuclear bomb**

Useful commands: /gamerule disableNukeChangeBiome true - useful if you have a weak PC or you want to use this mod on server

Game versions: Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.21.1, NeoForge 1.21.4

Newest mod version: release-1.0.0
